Interactive PPI Sample Size Calculator

Prediction-powered one-sample mean/prevalence and difference in prevalence

sample-size-calculator.Rmd

This calculator uses prediction-powered inference (PPI/PPI++) formulas from this package for quick study planning examples. It is designed for planning and intuition; for final protocol numbers, confirm assumptions with your statistician.

Interactive PPI Tool

Prediction-powered sample size calculator

Browser-based planner aligned with pppower formulas.

Assumptions: labeled outcomes are sampled completely at random from the target population, and labeled/unlabeled sets are from the same population.

Non-response: expected share of sampled units without a usable labeled outcome. Recruitment-adjusted n inflates by 1 / (1 - non-response).

Methods: details and derivations are on Variance & Methods.

Inputs

Binary prevalence inputs

Prediction quality

Continuous mean moments

Results

PPI analysis n (base) -
PPI recruitment n (adjusted) -
Classical n (no prediction) -
Labeled saving vs classical -
Classic
-
PPI
-
PPI adj.
-
Formula note will appear here.

Inputs

Prediction quality by group

Results

PPI n per group (base) -
PPI recruitment n (adj A / B) -
Classical n per group -
Labeled saving vs classical -
Classic
-
PPI
-
PPI adj.
-

Formula details intentionally hidden here for readability. See Variance & Methods for full equations.
